raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Remove the person from the contaminated area.
STEP 2: Keep the person resting.
STEP 3: Seek medical attention if symptoms develop or persist.
DO NOT: Do not keep working in the contaminated area after inhalation exposure.
ESCALATE: Seek medical attention.

immediate_steps: Remove the person from the contaminated area.
Seek medical attention if symptoms develop or persist.
do_not_do: Do not keep working in the contaminated area after inhalation exposure.
